catalog_url.notes: Category pages are SPAs. Product data loaded via JavaScript after initial render.

list_page_url.notes: Browser render returns HTML shell without product data. Products loaded via JS micro-frontends. JSON-LD has BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, AggregateRating but no ItemList.

detail_url_pattern.notes: Product page has JSON-LD Product schema with full data.

pagination.notes: Pagination not visible in initial HTML. Likely loaded via API calls.

sample_product.name: Bosch Professional GST 18V-125 B 5,0 Ah ProCORE Accu (2x) Starterspakket
sample_product.brand.name: Bosch Professional
sample_product.description: Start direct met het Bosch Professional GST 18V-125 5,0 Ah ProCORE Accu (2x) Starterspakket...

api_response_sample.notes: Product detail pages have rich JSON-LD. Listing pages are SPAs without product data.

title.example: Bosch Professional GST 18V-125 B 5,0 Ah ProCORE Accu (2x) Starterspakket

reasons: Product detail pages have excellent JSON-LD data
Image CDN with predictable URL structure
limitations: Listing pages are SPAs without product data in HTML
No visible product listing API discovered
Cannot extract product lists without JavaScript execution
Need to discover product URLs through other means (sitemap, API)
clm_suitability.recommended_approach: Product detail page scraping via JSON-LD. Need to discover product URL list via sitemap or API.

blocking_issues: Listing page is SPA - no product data in initial HTML
Browser render doesn't capture JS-loaded product data
next_steps: Try sitemap.xml to discover product URLs
Investigate coolblue API endpoints from network traffic
Use product detail page JSON-LD as fallback
Try different browser wait strategies for SPA content
